forbidden_changes: do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not remove approach_progress or near_stage_stability
do not only scale coefficients without structural changes
required_changes: restructure safe_landing_bonus and intermediate_safe_bonus to use progressive thresholds that become more stringent over time or state conditions to gradually shape toward success
ensure gated_timeout_penalty only applies to trajectories with negligible progress (delta_dist < 0 and curr_dist > 0.5) rather than all truncations
consider adding a small continuous terminal bonus that activates when the lander is close and stable, not just at termination

intended_fix: condition reward by progress or stability stage
expected_effect: Handle stage-dependent task conflicts and discourage low-progress survival.
risk: Stage gates may be imperfect before trajectory memory is available.
